description: Inspect Midjourney jobs, queue, folders, and discovery feeds from the terminal

novel_features.name: Submit Midjourney image jobs
novel_features.description: Submit Midjourney imagine jobs through the browser-observed /api/submit-jobs flow, including model/version, style, reference, draft, and tuning flags.

novel_features.name: Rerun existing jobs
novel_features.description: Submit the observed Midjourney reroll payload for an existing job ID.

novel_features.name: Export rendered images
novel_features.description: Export rendered Midjourney job images through Chrome CDP when direct CDN fetches are blocked by Cloudflare or CORS.
